Video.summary: While Tony investigates the murder of a local drug and weapons dealer, Rachel is taken hostage.
Video.title: Romeo And Juliet

Video.summary: Rick Hunter's back. He's considering marrying his girlfriend. But before he could, she is murdered.
Video.title: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Image.alt: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall go undercover at an exclusive resort to find a blackmailer's killer.
Video.title: The Biggest Man In Town

Video.summary: A motorcycle cop is killed by a man on a "nighthawk." The killer motivated by a dispute over a game at a bar.
Video.title: The Shooter

Video.summary: Tony is asked to keep a young girl from being returned to her sexually abusive father.
Video.title: The Letter Of The Law

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate a Chinese gang leader being pursued by a police officer with a personal interest
Video.title: Night Of The Dragons

Video.summary: A millionaire is nearly killed, his wife the prime suspect, until she's murdered.
Video.title: Rich Girl

Video.summary: Tony runs up against an overzealous security guard; Rachel's father turns to Tony for help in a business deal.
Video.title: Security

Video.summary: After seeing his mother killed by a stranger, a boy withdraws deep into himself, prompting a sympathetic Tony to step up his efforts to catch the murderer.
Video.title: The Wicked Flee

Video.summary: After Tony arrests Stan's murderer and Ross is convicted, he and his family must take refuge
Video.title: The Iceman Cometh

Video.summary: A mugging triggers a woman's repressed memory of her brother's murder, which she witnessed as a child.
Video.title: Skeletons

Video.summary: As Tony faces a long recovery from his gunshot wounds, a cop is killed.
Video.title: Against The Wind, Part 1

Video.summary: The unwelcome appearance in Eastbridge of white supremacists leads to a murder, with the suspicion soon arising that one of more Tony's associates may be implicated.
Video.title: True Believers

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall must track down a killer who has been shooting parolees.
Video.title: The Garbage Man

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall witness a string of murders when they're assigned as technical advisers for a tv show.
Video.title: Killer In The Halloween Mask

Video.summary: Against departmental orders, Hunter goes to South America to stalk a diplomat who raped McCall.
Video.title: Rape And Revenge, Part 2

Video.summary: When McCall is raped by a South American diplomat immune from prosecution, Hunter follows him to his homeland.
Video.title: Rape And Revenge, Part 1

Video.summary: Vietnamese gangs threaten Eastbridge and Tony steps in to help.
Video.title: Charlie Don't Surf

Video.summary: In an effort make sergeant, Stan enlists an abused wife to catch her suspected drug dealer husband.
Video.title: Sergeant Kelly

Video.summary: A prominent doctor kills an officer's wife while driving drunk.
Video.title: Dead Drunk

Video.summary: Reno investigates a series of mysterious racehorse deaths.
Video.title: Dead Heat

Video.summary: Reno protects a deceased hit man's daughter and reveals the truth to her about her father's profession.
Video.title: An Uncle In The Business

Video.summary: Reno takes part in a boat race to investigate mysterious crashes.
Video.title: Offshore Thunder

Video.summary: Reno goes undercover to infiltrate a corrupt escort service in order to help Bobby's former fiancee.
Video.title: Studs

Video.summary: When Reno and Cheyenne pose as newlyweds, their intimate feelings for each other become apparent.
Video.title: Another Place And Time
